name: @range-crm/slack-bot
description: Slack bot for Range CRM — planned next milestone

plannedCommands./crm qualify [text]: ICP scoring via MCP tool, score card posted in thread
plannedCommands./crm brief [company]: Meeting prep brief via MCP tool
plannedCommands./crm pipeline: Current pipeline snapshot from Twenty GraphQL
plannedCommands./crm draft [company]: Personalized outreach draft via MCP tool
plannedCommands./crm who today: Agent-ranked list of accounts to contact today

plannedChannels.#crm-inbound: New InboundLead scored — tier badge, score, rationale, [Assign] button
plannedChannels.#crm-signals: ICP score > 80 OR health spike — account, signal, recommended action
plannedChannels.#crm-health: Inactive 14d + health < 60 — last touchpoint, [Draft check-in] button
plannedChannels.#crm-wins: Deal → Closed Won — AE, company, ARR, product mix
plannedChannels.#crm-digest: Friday 5PM AI-generated weekly pipeline + risk summary
